Package zipkin2.collector.pulsar

package zipkin2.collector.pulsar
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    PulsarCollector
    This collector consumes encoded binary messages from a Pulsar topic.

    Configuration including defaults needed to consume spans from a Pulsar topic.
